headline: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
summary: Epic Games is introducing 36 AI-powered characters for Fortnite. Creators can publish experiences featuring these NPCs starting July 30th. These characters come with consistent voices and personas.

headline: Samsung’s 55-inch Frame art TV is $200 cheaper than usual
summary: Samsung's 55-inch Frame 4K TV is currently on sale, $200 off its usual price. This unique TV displays art when not in use, transforming your living room. Its design includes bezels and a matte finish to resemble framed artwork.

headline: Netflix says around 300 titles used generative AI
summary: Netflix revealed that approximately 300 titles on its platform utilized generative AI. Most AI integration occurred in post-production, according to its Q2 earnings report. The company uses AI for faster, higher quality, and lower cost content delivery.

headline: Why are people buying so many CDs?
summary: CD sales are unexpectedly rising, driven by fans seeking affordable artist support. US sales increased 16% year-over-year in the first half of 2026. This trend signals a notable resurgence in physical media.

headline: Save $400 Off the Top-of-the-Line 32" ASUS ROG Swift 4K 240Hz QD-OLED Gaming Monitor
summary: Get $400 off the premium 32" ASUS ROG Swift 4K 240Hz QD-OLED Gaming Monitor. This high-end display includes an excellent 3-year warranty. The warranty specifically covers OLED burn-in.

headline: The Diveblues Portable Turbo Fan Is a Cheap and Easy Way to Beat the Heat, Even When You're Outdoors
summary: The Diveblues Portable Turbo Fan is an inexpensive solution for outdoor cooling. It is currently available for just $11.69. This price requires using a special coupon code.

headline: Lost Fan Simon Pegg 'Loved' the Show But Has at Least One Idea to Fix Its Ending
summary: Actor Simon Pegg, a devoted fan, 'loved' the iconic TV show Lost. Despite his appreciation, he believes the series' ending could be improved. Pegg reportedly has an idea to amend its conclusion.

headline: Microsoft Restores Player's 25-Year-Old Account With Son's Baby Photos After Nuking It Due to Hacker
summary: Microsoft restored a player's 25-year-old account after it was deleted due to a hacker. The account contained invaluable baby photos of his son. It also held thousands of dollars worth of games.

headline: Sadiq Khan among 26 new peers to enter the Lords
summary: London mayor Sadiq Khan is among 26 new individuals appointed to the House of Lords. Broadcaster June Sarpong and former union chief Christina McAnea will also join. These appointments introduce new members to the UK's legislative body.

headline: Burnham to promise new path for UK when he becomes new Labour leader
summary: Andy Burnham will deliver a speech outlining his vision for the UK on Friday. He is expected to be confirmed as the new Labour leader next week. This precedes his anticipated role as Prime Minister.

headline: Fifa 'assessing match reports' over Falklands banner
summary: FIFA is reviewing match reports after Argentina's football team displayed a Falklands banner. The organization will decide on potential disciplinary action following its assessment. This incident reignites political tensions surrounding the Falkland Islands.

headline: Blasts reported in Iran as US launches new wave of strikes
summary: Blasts have been reported in Iran following a fresh wave of US military strikes. The US asserts these attacks aim to 'further degrade Iranian military capabilities.' This marks the sixth consecutive day of ongoing fighting in the region.
